name: Inference Request
description: Hierarchical field structure for an Open Inference Protocol V2 inference request, as used by KServe, NVIDIA Triton, BentoML, and other OIP-compliant inference servers.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Optional request correlation ID echoed in the response.

fields.name: parameters
fields.description: Optional key-value parameters for model pre/post-processing.

fields.name: inputs
fields.description: Input tensors for the inference request.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Tensor name matching the model's input specification.

fields.name: datatype
fields.description: OIP datatype: BOOL, INT32, INT64, FP32, FP64, BYTES, STRING, etc.

fields.name: data
fields.description: Tensor data in row-major order. Nested arrays or base64 binary.

fields.name: outputs
fields.description: Optional list of outputs to return (all returned if omitted).

fields.name: name
fields.description: Name of the output tensor to include.
